title: space_join: caller already-member not checked before use_space_invite_code
description: jmap.rs space_join calls use_space_invite_code with no prior guard that caller is not already a member of the target space. If use_space_invite_code does an INSERT OR IGNORE or INSERT OR REPLACE for space_member, calling Space/join twice creates ambiguity (is membership updated, or is it a no-op?). The response returns the spaceId on both calls as if both succeeded. Clients cannot distinguish a re-join from a first join. Trigger: call Space/join with same valid unexpired code twice.
